title: MythrOS Foundry Bridge
description: MythrOS ⇄ Foundry VTT (dnd5e) bridge for KoTT.gg / Ashreach: two-way chat + dice-roll relay, HP/economy live sync, account provisioning, AND MythrOS combat augmentation (hidden monster HP, async turn-prep declarations, permadeath) over one socket. D&D 5e only.
